rules.description: PureFlow Water must never appear in scenes depicting violence, fighting, or physical harm. The brand represents purity, calm, and wellness.
PureFlow Water must not appear alongside alcoholic beverages, people drinking alcohol, or in bar/nightclub settings, as this conflicts with our health-focused positioning.
PureFlow Water must not appear in the same frame or scene as competitor beverage brands (e.g. Aquafina, Dasani, Evian, SmartWater). Co-branding dilutes brand identity.
PureFlow Water should not be associated with fast food, chips, candy, or other highly processed food. The brand must maintain its clean, health-conscious image.
PureFlow Water is committed to environmental sustainability. The brand must not appear in scenes showing littering, pollution, or destruction of natural environments.
